query: I have an Obsidian vault with half a review-gated workflow in it and I honestly do not know what step to run first. Can you inspect the structure and tell me whether this is setup, compile, review, query, or maintenance work?
reason: Workflow-level ambiguity and lifecycle diagnosis.

query: I want an Obsidian living book for AI notes with draft/live separation and review gates, but I am not asking you to compile or query yet. Explain how the workflow hangs together and which step should start.
reason: Whole-workflow Obsidian vault request rather than one operation.

query: Set up a fresh Obsidian sub-vault as a review-gated knowledge base with raw, wiki, outputs/reviews, starter indices, and local guidance files.
reason: Explicit initialization request.

query: Repair this partially initialized Obsidian vault before I ingest anything else. It has raw/, wiki/index.md, and wiki/log.md, but the support layer is obviously incomplete.
reason: Explicit repair of the support layer.

query: My vault still has raw, wiki, and outputs, but the local AGENTS.md contract file got deleted. Route me to the right repair step before anyone compiles or queries anything else.
reason: Missing AGENTS.md is a blocking contract repair.

query: This older Obsidian vault still uses wiki/summaries and wiki/concepts directly. Migrate it to the review-gated layout before we do anything else.
reason: Explicit legacy-layout migration.

query: Compile the new markdown notes I dropped under raw/human/articles and raw/agents/researcher into reviewable drafts without touching the raw files.
reason: Explicit compile pass from raw into drafts.

query: I dumped two markdown notes directly under raw/ in my Obsidian vault. Please sync the draft layer now and just warn me that CLAUDE.md is missing if needed.
reason: Root-level raw markdown compile edge case.

query: Refresh the draft layer because a raw article changed and one new capture has no summary yet. Do not promote anything to live.
reason: Incremental compile delta request.

query: Run the review gate on my Obsidian drafts now. Approve what is ready, reject what is weak, and only escalate the ambiguous cases.
reason: Explicit review gate request.

query: Lifecycle detection says needs-review. Please inspect the pending drafts, cited raw captures, and overlapping live pages, then decide what should persist.
reason: Direct needs-review trigger.

query: My approved live pages changed after the last briefing build. Rebuild the stale briefing without turning this into a normal query pass.
reason: Direct needs-briefing-refresh trigger.

query: What do my approved Obsidian notes already say about review gates? If the answer is substantive, archive it back into the vault.
reason: Grounded research query against the approved live layer.

query: Search the live wiki for everything related to local markdown search, reuse prior outputs/qa if they help, and give me a short grounded answer.
reason: Search and reuse prior durable answers.

query: Turn my approved live layer into a short X thread about why personal knowledge workflows should keep a review gate before query-time synthesis.
reason: Publish-mode artifact grounded in live knowledge.

query: Run a weekly health check on this approved Obsidian vault. I care about stale Q&A, weak provenance, contradictions, and whether the live layer has started drifting.
reason: Explicit maintenance and health pass.

query: My archived answers have pending writeback candidates and I want the vault audited before I keep querying it.
reason: Writeback backlog is a maintenance signal, not a normal query.

query: This vault has a MEMORY.md with preferences and editorial priorities. Keep that outside the topic retrieval boundary and tell me what layer is still query truth.
reason: Query-time boundary clarification for approved live knowledge versus collaboration memory.

query: Lint the live wiki for render issues in tables, stale briefings, and approval drift. Apply only obvious mechanical fixes and leave judgment calls for humans.
reason: Health workflow with safe mechanical fixes only.

query: My approved layer is structurally present, but the archived Q&A notes are older than the newer live concepts they cite. Audit drift first, not query.
reason: Maintenance-first due stale Q&A drift.

query: Help me design a vector retrieval service for SaaS documentation with embeddings, reranking, and a retrieval API. This is not an Obsidian vault.
reason: Search infrastructure design outside this bundle.

query: My Notion workspace needs a better tagging strategy for product notes. Should I rebuild the database or rely on relation properties?
reason: Not an Obsidian review-gated vault request.

query: Summarize this one article for me in plain English. I do not want to add it to any wiki, archive it, or maintain a vault.
reason: Standalone summarization request without vault intent.

query: Make a Mermaid architecture diagram for my backend service from the codebase. No Obsidian vault involved.
reason: Diagramming request outside bundle scope.
